activities_projects.title: Main Character Identification
activities_projects.objective: Identify the main character of the story
steps: Read the lesson carefully
Identify the main character in the story
Write two sentences about the character
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Identifies the main character and his role

activities_projects.title: Natural Disaster Description
activities_projects.objective: Understand the disaster described in the lesson
steps: Read the section describing the cyclone
Write 3–4 sentences about the cyclone
Mention the damage it caused
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands the effects of natural disasters

activities_projects.title: Prashant’s Journey
activities_projects.objective: Understand the difficulties faced by Prashant
steps: Read the part about Prashant returning to his village
List two difficulties he faced on the way
Write them in simple sentences
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands challenges faced by the character

activities_projects.title: Life at the Shelter
activities_projects.objective: Understand the condition of people in the shelter
steps: Read the part describing the cyclone shelter
Write 3 sentences describing the situation of the people
Mention their problems
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Recognizes the struggles of disaster victims

activities_projects.title: Leadership of Prashant
steps: Find actions taken by Prashant to help people
Write 3 points showing his leadership
Explain each point briefly
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands qualities of a good leader

activities_projects.title: Helping Orphans
activities_projects.objective: Understand how children were helped after the cyclone
steps: Read the part about orphaned children
Write 3–4 sentences explaining how Prashant helped them
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands care and support for children

activities_projects.title: Community Support
steps: Identify how villagers helped one another
Write three examples from the lesson

activities_projects.title: Message to Helicopters
activities_projects.objective: Understand the creative idea used to get help
steps: Read the part where children communicate with helicopters
Write 2–3 sentences explaining this idea

activities_projects.title: Vocabulary from the Lesson
steps: Choose five new words from the lesson
Write their meanings
Use them in sentences

activities_projects.title: Moral of the Story
activities_projects.objective: Understand the moral message of the lesson
steps: Think about what the story teaches
Write the moral in 3–4 sentences
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands values like courage and helping others
